gaps.title: Carousel state corruption on quota exceeded
gaps.breaks: User loses carousel position when switching between tenants that exceed storage quota
gaps.scenario: User with 3 tenants (A, B, C) views carousel on Tenant A, switches to Tenant B which exceeds localStorage quota, then back to Tenant A - carousel resets to first slide
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates localStorage quota exceeded error during carousel state persistence. Test that carousel maintains position when switching between tenants, even when one tenant exceeds localStorage quota. Verify graceful degradation when quota is exceeded.

gaps.title: Race condition in autoplay resume
gaps.breaks: Carousel autoplay resumes multiple times when user switches tabs rapidly
gaps.scenario: User opens landing page, switches to another tab within 10 seconds, then switches back - triggers multiple autoplay resume events causing unpredictable carousel behavior
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates rapid tab switching during carousel autoplay. Verify that only one autoplay resume timer is active at any time, and that multiple tab switches don't cause race conditions in the autoplay functionality.

gaps.title: Tenant isolation in localStorage
gaps.breaks: Carousel state leaks between different tenant accounts
gaps.scenario: User logs into Tenant A, views carousel, logs into Tenant B without clearing browser, sees Tenant A's carousel position on Tenant B's page
gaps.prompt: Write a test that verifies carousel state is properly isolated by tenant ID in localStorage. Test that switching between different tenant accounts doesn't cause carousel state to leak between them.

gaps.title: Responsive table data truncation
gaps.breaks: Comparison table cells cut off on mobile without proper scrolling
gaps.scenario: User views pricing table on mobile device - feature descriptions and pricing details are truncated with no horizontal scroll indicator
gaps.prompt: Write a test that verifies the responsive behavior of the comparison table across different screen sizes. Test that table content is properly accessible on mobile devices with appropriate scrolling mechanisms.

gaps.title: Autoplay resume on page visibility change
gaps.breaks: Carousel resumes when it shouldn't after page restore
gaps.scenario: User pauses carousel, minimizes browser window, restores window - carousel resumes automatically despite user having paused it
gaps.prompt: Write a test that verifies carousel respects user pause state after page visibility changes. Test that autoplay only resumes after 10 seconds of continuous visibility, not immediately when page is restored.

raw_response:
GAPS FOUND: 5

GAP 1
Severity: CRITICAL
Title: Carousel state corruption on quota exceeded
What breaks: User loses carousel position when switching between tenants that exceed storage quota
Real scenario: User with 3 tenants (A, B, C) views carousel on Tenant A, switches to Tenant B which exceeds localStorage quota, then back to Tenant A - carousel resets to first slide
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates localStorage quota exceeded error during carousel state persistence. Test that carousel maintains position when switching between tenants, even when one tenant exceeds localStorage quota. Verify graceful degradation when quota is exceeded.

GAP 2
Severity: HIGH
Title: Race condition in autoplay resume
What breaks: Carousel autoplay resumes multiple times when user switches tabs rapidly
Real scenario: User opens landing page, switches to another tab within 10 seconds, then switches back - triggers multiple autoplay resume events causing unpredictable carousel behavior
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates rapid tab switching during carousel autoplay. Verify that only one autoplay resume timer is active at any time, and that multiple tab switches don't cause race conditions in the autoplay functionality.

GAP 3
Severity: HIGH
Title: Tenant isolation in localStorage
What breaks: Carousel state leaks between different tenant accounts
Real scenario: User logs into Tenant A, views carousel, logs into Tenant B without clearing browser, sees Tenant A's carousel position on Tenant B's page
AI agent prompt: Write a test that verifies carousel state is properly isolated by tenant ID in localStorage. Test that switching between different tenant accounts doesn't cause carousel state to leak between them.

GAP 4
Severity: MEDIUM
Title: Responsive table data truncation
What breaks: Comparison table cells cut off on mobile without proper scrolling
Real scenario: User views pricing table on mobile device - feature descriptions and pricing details are truncated with no horizontal scroll indicator
AI agent prompt: Write a test that verifies the responsive behavior of the comparison table across different screen sizes. Test that table content is properly accessible on mobile devices with appropriate scrolling mechanisms.

GAP 5
Severity: MEDIUM
Title: Autoplay resume on page visibility change
What breaks: Carousel resumes when it shouldn't after page restore
Real scenario: User pauses carousel, minimizes browser window, restores window - carousel resumes automatically despite user having paused it
AI agent prompt: Write a test that verifies carousel respects user pause state after page visibility changes. Test that autoplay only resumes after 10 seconds of continuous visibility, not immediately when page is restored.
